category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to South African market (Department of Employment and Labour OHS Act, SANS 50149 / EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, SABS testing, in-country importer).

title.en: China-to-South Africa PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入南非（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入南非（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against South African requirements: occupational respiratory protection under the Department of Employment and Labour Occupational Health and Safety Act (OHS Act 85 of 1993), the adopted national standard SANS 50149 (identical adoption of EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), SABS / SANS test methods, and the in-country importer obligation. South Africa is 230 V / 50 Hz; ports of entry are Durban and Cape Town.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与南非要求对照：涵盖南非就业与劳工部《职业健康与安全法》（OHS Act 85 of 1993）项下的职业呼吸防护、采用的国家标准SANS 50149（等同采用EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、SABS/SANS检测方法，以及在地进口商义务。南非为230 V/50 Hz；入境口岸为德班（Durban）及开普敦（Cape Town）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與南非要求對照：涵蓋南非就業與勞工部《職業健康與安全法》（OHS Act 85 of 1993）項下的職業呼吸防護、採用的國家標準SANS 50149（等同採用EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、SABS/SANS檢測方法，以及在地進口商義務。南非為230 V/50 Hz；入境口岸為德班（Durban）及開普敦（Cape Town）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-laboratory assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current South African law, adopted SANS standards, SABS test scope, and NRCS / Department of Employment and Labour market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The classification of a respirator as occupational PPE versus a medical device under SAHPRA requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可实验室评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行南非法律、采用的SANS标准、SABS检测范围及NRCS/就业与劳工部市场监督实践。呼吸器属职业PPE抑或属SAHPRA项下医疗器械的分类，需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可實驗室評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行南非法律、採用的SANS標準、SABS檢測範圍及NRCS/就業與勞工部市場監督實踐。呼吸器屬職業PPE抑或屬SAHPRA項下醫療器械的分類，需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: Filtering facepiece respirators sold for occupational use in South Africa are governed by the Occupational Health and Safety Act (Act 85 of 1993) administered by the Department of Employment and Labour, and must conform to SANS 50149 — South Africa's identical national adoption of EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3). Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not satisfy SANS 50149 / EN 149; the product must be re-tested to EN 149 methods (typically at SABS or an accredited laboratory). A South African in-country importer carries the legal placing-on-market and OHS-supply obligations. Note the boundary: medical/surgical masks fall under SAHPRA medical-device control, not occupational PPE.
answer_first.zh: 在南非用于职业用途的过滤式半面罩呼吸器，受就业与劳工部主管的《职业健康与安全法》（Act 85 of 1993）规管，并须符合SANS 50149——南非等同采用EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的国家标准。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不满足SANS 50149/EN 149；产品须按EN 149方法重新检测（通常在SABS或认可实验室）。南非在地进口商承担投放市场及OHS供应的法律义务。注意界定：医用/外科口罩属SAHPRA医疗器械规管，而非职业PPE。
answer_first.zht: 在南非用於職業用途的過濾式半面罩呼吸器，受就業與勞工部主管的《職業健康與安全法》（Act 85 of 1993）規管，並須符合SANS 50149——南非等同採用EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的國家標準。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不滿足SANS 50149/EN 149；產品須按EN 149方法重新檢測（通常在SABS或認可實驗室）。南非在地進口商承擔投放市場及OHS供應的法律義務。注意界定：醫用/外科口罩屬SAHPRA醫療器械規管，而非職業PPE。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, accredited laboratory, or primary legal source preferred. South African government gazettes, the SABS/SANS standards catalogue, NRCS, the Department of Employment and Labour, and SAHPRA are the primary sources. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
